device_name: UNICEL DXH 800 COULTER CELLULAR ANALYSIS SYSTEM
intended_use: The UniCel® DxH 800 COULTER® Analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter, automated hematology analyzer for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in clinical laboratories. The
intended_use_full: The UniCel® DxH 800 COULTER® Analyzer is a quantitative multi-parameter, automated hematology analyzer for in vitro diagnostic use in screening patient populations found in clinical laboratories. The UniCel® DxH 800 COULTER® Analyzer identifies and enumerates the parameters indicated below on the following sample types: Whole Blood (Venous and Capillary), Pre-Diluted Whole Blood (Venous and Capillary), and Body Fluids (cerebrospinal, serous and synovial).
